brief_html: Requests a profile for a user in the WarCraft III profile system.
remarks_html:
Requests a profile for a user in the WarCraft III profile system.

This message's official name is not known, and has been invented.

It is safe to look up any username you want, of any length and validity. It may also be used by any product and not just WarCraft III.

Battle.net will translate the realm/namespace in the username for you, so you can look up "#Azeroth" as well as "#USEast", if you want. You cannot perform cross-gateway look ups.

If you look up a user that is not on their Warcraft III user table, then the clan tag in the replying message will always be null.
